subcodes.first_line: O enkindled flame! Thy devotion and thy chanting are known and heard, and thy supplication and thy praise are accepted at the threshold of oneness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شعله افروخته تبتل و ترتیلت معلوم و مسموع و تضرع و تهلیلت درگاه احدیت مقبول
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @importance of prayer, @praise and encouragement
